task: Fix heartbeat system — integrate periodic updates into MCP tools so agents don't show as offline after 5 minutes
report: Fixed heartbeat system. Added touch_heartbeat() helper to mcps/shared/helpers.py that updates last_heartbeat and status without overwriting other registry fields. Integrated it into message_agent (sender), speak_in_turn (sender), and complete_task (agent) in agent-manager server.py. PR #28: https://github.com/Duongntd/strawberry/pull/28
